name: Laurence Olivier
abstract: Laurence Kerr Olivier, Baron Olivier ( ə-LIV-ee-ay; 22 May 1907 – 11 July 1989) was an English actor and director. He and his contemporaries John Gielgud, Michael Redgrave and Ralph Richardson made up a quartet of male actors who dominated the British stage of the mid-20th century.

concerts.label: United Nations Human Rights Day Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Shorter
about_quotes.evidence: Laurence Olivier was in this movie for five minutes. He wanted to be in this movie.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Shorter — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
